$$\begin{array}{r@{\quad}l}
\text{Linear (Gaussian):} &
\mu
\underset{\xleftarrow[]{\text{id}}}{\xrightarrow[]{\text{id}}}
\eta(\vx) = \vx'\tilde\beta
\\[3em]
\text{Logistic (Bernoulli):} &
\underbrace{\mu}_{\pi}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expit(\logodds)]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\underbrace{\odds}_{\text{odds}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\logodds}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
\underbrace{\logodds}_{\eta(\vx)} = \vx'\tilde\beta
\\[3em]
\text{Count (Poisson):} &
\underbrace{\mu}_{\lambda t}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\eta} \cdot t]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\mu / t}
}
\lambda
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\eta}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\lambda}}
}
\eta(\vx) = \vx'\tilde\beta
\\[3em]
\text{Survival (Cox PH):} &
\surv(t|\vx)
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{-\cuhaz(t)}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{-\logf{\surv(t)}}
}
\cuhaz(t|\vx)
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\int_0^t \haz(u)\,du]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\haz(t)}
}
\haz(t|\vx)
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\eta}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\haz(t)}}
}
\eta(t,\vx) = \vx'\tilde\beta + \logf{\haz_0(t)}
\end{array}$$
